rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THEODORE PAUL JONES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the judicial officer to review and determine whether to take this petition off calendar for lack of satisfactory progress: The DE-121 forms filed on 05/14/2025 & 06/12/2025 listed additional recipients of notice as cousins of the decedent, but no verified supplement has been filed to update items 6 & 8 of the amended petition. It should be noted that: i) The matter has been pending since October 2024. ii) Counsel represented to the Court at the 03/24/2025 hearing that she was waiting for a report from the heir search firm, but the heir search firm was not retained until 03/28/2025, according to their correspondence to counsel attached to the report. iii) Counsel did not ask the heir search firm to investigate the predeceased spouse's relatives entitled to notice. iv) Counsel received a final report from the heir search firm on 05/29/2025 and filed the report (172 pages) as is on 06/25/2025, without preparing a verified supplement to list the name and address of each heir. In addition, the following issues have not been addressed since the 01/13/2025 hearing: 1) Please provide facts in support of the allegation at item 7b(3) of the amended petition that the decedent's predeceased spouse had no interest in the estate real property listed at item 3d(4). 2) No family tree has been provided for the decedent's predeceased spouse. The family tree must show the predeceased spouse's relatives under Probate Code section 6402.5(a), absent proof that the predeceased spouse had no interest in the estate real property. It should be noted that counsel represented to the Court at the 03/24/2025 hearing that she was aware of at least 3 sisters-in-law. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAMELA ROBBINS 2019 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/10/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Probate Code Section 850 is a shortcut for a full, formal estate administration; all heirs are required to be identified and noticed. (2) If an interested party cannot be located after diligent search, an ex parte petition must be filed to request that the Court dispense with notice to such party. [CRC 7.52.] (3) Dates of death for any reportedly deceased heir or beneficiary must be set forth. (4) Notice must be personally served on any party whose interest may be affected by the petition. [Probate Code Sect. 851(b)(3) and 17203(b).] Linda Silver and William Goldman have not waived personal service. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/27/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SHARON LEATRICE THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO PRIMARY RESIDENCE
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/15/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Who is or was the decedent's father? If he is deceased, when did he die? (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) Please file a copy of the vesting deed, showing how title is held. (4) The "supplement" AMENDED the petition. [CRC 7.3 and 7.53(a).] (The appraisal was for a 1/5 interest) Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 9/2/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE LEON KUYPER LIVING TRUST DATED JUNE 7, 2024
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Confirm Assets To Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/21/25. The following issues must be cleared two weeks prior: (1) A copy of the trust, including the schedules, must be provided. (2) Need a copy of the current asset vesting (i.e. bank statement showing the account holder's name). Also, need clarification if there is any asset transferred to the name of the trust as Paragraph #6 states some property remained the settlor's individual name. (3) A copy of the assignment to the trust that paragraph 10 is referring to. (4) Allegation whether any or all assets subject to the petition have a designated beneficiary. (5) Allegation whether the deceased testator has any other testamentary document, such as a [pour over] will. If so, a copy of the document needs to be filed. (6) Notice of Directions for Remote appearance and Access must be given. LRSF 14.1.C. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/15/25. Deadline was 6/16/25 to provide courtesy copies to the assigned examiner of any new papers addressing the issues posted for the hearing on 5/12/25. No verified supplement has been filed yet to complete the missing information in the petition. New deadline is 9/2/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY SANDEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues that remain unaddressed: 1) The proof of service does not show notice was given to competing petitioner. 2) Was the decedent a citizen of Sierra Leone? If so, notice must be given to the Sierra Leone Embassy, as required by Probate Code section 8113. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY SANDEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues that remain unaddressed: 1) No proof of publication is on file. 2) Re the DE-121 form filed on 06/20/2025: i) The proof of service shows notice was given on 06/19/2025, less than 15 days before this hearing. ii) The proof of service was not dated. iii) The proof of service does not show notice was given to the attorney of record for competing petitioner. iv) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) was not attached. Note: If the decedent was a citizen of Sierra Leone, notice must be given (by mailing a copy of the DE-121 form with the remote appearance information) to the Embassy of Sierra Leone in the United States. See Probate Code section 8113. 3) Re item 3e(2) of petition: No bond waivers (DE-142 forms) signed by the decedent's children are on file. 4) Re item 5a of petition: i) (1) or (2) (at least one box) must be checked. ii) (3) or (4) (at least one box) must be checked. iii) (7) or (8) (at least one box) must be checked. 5) Re item 8 of petition: i) Each listed person's relationship to the decedent must be specified. ii) If the decedent was survived by children, each child must be listed. iii) Petitioner (including an address) must be listed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANDREW DOMINIC CHINAZZO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 07/27/2026.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GAYLE ELAINE ATWELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/16/25 for filing of proof of publication. All documents to be filed by 6/30/25.
